mapper.select: SELECT user_code AS userCode, employee_no AS employeeNo, email AS email, name AS name, phone AS phone, position AS position, created_at AS createdAt, sys_ck AS sysCk FROM users WHERE user_code = #{userCode}
SELECT user_code, password_hash FROM users WHERE user_code = #{userCode}

SELECT p.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, p.status AS status, cc.code_name AS statusName, LISTAGG(r.role_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.role_name) AS roles FROM project_role_user pru
JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = pru.project_code
JOIN role r ON r.role_code = pru.role_code
LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON cc.group_code = 'OD' AND cc.code_id = p.status
WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode} AND p.status <> 'OD2' AND ( p.status <> 'OD3' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM project_role_user pru2 JOIN role r2 ON r2.role_code = pru2.role_code WHERE pru2.user_code = #{userCode} AND pru2.project_code = p.project_code AND r2.admin_ck = 'Y' ) ) GROUP BY p.project_code, p.project_name, p.status, cc.code_name ORDER BY p.project_name

SELECT g.group_code AS groupCode, g.gr_name AS groupName, g.description AS description, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_member gm2 WHERE gm2.gr_code = g.group_code ) AS memberCount FROM group_member gm
JOIN "GROUP" g ON g.group_code = gm.gr_code
WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} ORDER BY g.gr_name
